    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'

ws_task.cell(11, 3).value = f'=INDEX(Data!$A$2:$AZ$201,MATCH($A11,Data!$A$2:$A$201,0),0)'

wb.save('protein_expression.xlsx')
print("\n=== File saved ===")

EOF
